titleStmt.title: SII 24.222: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 222. (A.R. No. 40 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records that on the representation made by Kariyamāṇikka Āḻvār, the Śrīkāriyam, and the other temple executives, 3645 kuḻi of temple land were made over towards sites for the formation of a colony named Ravivarmachaturvēdimaṅgalam after Ravivarmaṉ alias Vēṇāṭṭaḍigaḷ and for a temple for Ravinārāyaṇap-perumāḷ. The land for the colony is said to have been purchased for 4,000 paṇam out of which 1,800 were collected at the rate of 10 paṇam per kōl for private building sites and at 5 per kōl for deserted sites, the rest going towards the cost of the temple lands. Among the petitioners for the approval of the transaction figures the accountant Kōdai Uḷkkaṇakkappiḷḷai of Vēṇāṭṭaḍigaḷ. The petition was presented to the Lord on the occasion of Chittirai-Vishu in the 8+1st year of Perumāḷ Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva. Since the inscription mentions Kaliyugarāmaṉ-tiruvīdi among the details of the boundaries of the sites, which must have been evidently named after Kaliyugarāmaṉ, a title of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīrapāṇḍya who ascended the throne in 1296-97 A.D., the king of this record may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya of 1303 A.D., whose 9th regnal year therefore, will correspond to A.D. 1311-12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Etat sarvvāmarādhīśam maulimālā vibhūṣaṇam śrīmat śrīraṅga dhāmeśabhṛtya varggasya śāsanam § Aṭikaḷ veṇāṭṭaṭikaḷ tammuṭaiya tirunāmat tāl vaitta ravivarmma ccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku taṅkaḷ Akarattukku kuṭiyiruppukku veṇṭum Iṭamum Ivva
karattu Eḻuntaruḷuvikkiṟa nāyaṉār ravinārāyaṇap perumāḷ koyilukku veṇṭum Iṭamum Ivvakarattukku [ vāstuśeṣattukku] veṇṭum Iṭamum taṅkaḷukkuc centa Iṭattile kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu perumāḷ cuntara pāṇṭiya tevaṟku Eṭṭā
vati ṉetirāmāṇṭu cittirai viṣuvukku tiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiyile perumāḷ nācci māruṭaṉum kūṭa Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvārātaṉaṅ koṇṭaruḷāniṟka jiyarum Aṭikaḷ kāriyattukku kaṭava kotai Uḷk kaṇakkappiḷḷaiyum koyiṟ cikāriyam Ārāykiṟa piḷḷai kariyamāṇikkāḻvārum nāṅkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyyum ja
ṉaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Aṉaittuk kottukkaḷil Uḷḷārum perumāḷ śrī pādasevai paṇṇum bhaṭṭarkaḷum viṇṇappañ ceyya Ivvakarattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku maṉaikku veṇṭum Iṭamum Ivvakarattukku ṣai koḷḷac camaikkiṟa śikāppāka veṇṭum Iṭamum vāstuśeṣattukku veṇṭum Iṭamum centa Iṭatti
le kuṭukkavum Itukku kāṇivilai Āka nālāyiram paṇam Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikku Uṅkaḷ Eḻuttiṭṭa Olai kuṭuṅkoḷ Eṉṟu tiruvāy malarntaruḷi prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉatirumukam puṟappaṭṭu va karattukku veṇṭum ttu m tavirttu Ivarkaḷukkuk kāṇiyākak kuṭutta Irācamake
ntiraṉ tiruviti vaṭakkil tiruviti vaṭaciṟaku vāṉiḷavaṟutikku vaṭakkum kaliyuka rāmaṉ tiruviti kiḻaittiruviti vaṭakaṇṭattu vaṭatalai Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum kāveri Āṟṟaṅkaraikku teṟkum bhaṭṭarkaḷ tuṟaiyil nāyaṉār Ātikecavapperumāḷ koyi lukku melaimatiḷ Ellaikku mekkum teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa teṉvaṭalkol nāṟ
pattaiñcukku kiḻmel kol Eṇpattoṉṟiṉāl kuḻi muvāyirattaṟunūṟṟu nāṟ pattaiñcum Ivvakarattil Eḻuntaruḷivikkiṟa nāyaṉār koyilukkum bhaṭṭarkaḷ per nūṟṟirupatukku maṉai nūṟṟirupatukku veṇṭum Iṭattukkum kāṇiyākak koḷḷa vum . Ivvakarattu vāstuśeṣattukku Āṟṟukkup pokiṟa muṭukkuttuṟai kiḻai velikkuk kiḻakku I
vvakra vāstuvāṉa kol nāṟpattaiñcu Ellaikku vaṭakkum bhaṭṭarkaḷ tuṟaiyil nāyaṉār (r) Ātikecavapperumāḷ koyilellaikku meṟkum teṟkum kāveri niroṭu kāluṟa Uḷḷa Iṭamu(ma)m vāstuśeṣamum kāṇi palapaṭakkoḷḷavum Ivvāstuvukkum vāstuśeṣattukkum kāṇivilaiyāka niccayitta paṇam
paṇṭuṭaiyārum paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷarumāy maṉaiyuṭaiyavarkaḷukku Eṭuppumaṉaikkuk kol Oṉṟukkup paṇam pattum pāḻmaṉaikkuk kol Oṉṟukkup paṇam Añcum Āka vanta paṇam Āyiratteṇṇūṟu kuṭuttu Ivarkaḷ Eḻutippaṇittu koṇṭa sādha namum taṅkaḷukkut tarukaiyil Ivveṭuppu maṉaiyum pāḻmaṉaiyum nikki tiru
nāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa nilattu Uḷppaṭṭa nilattukkuk kāṇi vilaikku Iraṇṭāyirat tirunūṟu paṇam śrī paṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭu śrī paṇṭārattaravum taruvikkaiyil Ippaṭikkuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumāka candrādityavat celvatā(t)kavum . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakkoḷḷavum pāṟpatu §
Ivai karuṇākaradāsar Eḻuttu § Ivai koyil kātta perumāḷ nampi Eḻuttu § Ivai celvappirampudāsar Eḻuttu § tiruppaṇi ceyvārkaḷil Āḻvār Eḻuttu § śrī pātantāṅkuvāril śrī parāntaka brahmādhirājaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai tirumāliruñ colaip piccar Eḻuttu § Ivai tiruvaraṅka māḷikaippaṭṭar Eḻuttu § Ivai teṉṉavaṉ brahmādhirājaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai periya perumāḷ dāsar Eḻuttu §
Ivai paṇiyāl koyil kaṇakkup pu ṭaiyāṉ pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
